REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $442.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 64304855) AS TO DEFENDANT FISHMAN, MICHELE

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 64461351)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-11-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
